title: Geaspirit / Geo Discovery
summary: Autonomous proposal of underexplored AOIs for further geological review.
goals: discover unknown or underexplored areas of interest using free/open data only
rank candidate AOIs by remote proxy evidence (tectonic prior, commodity-belt compatibility, aridity, terrain ruggedness, data availability)
preserve novelty: penalise candidates that overlap known producing demos
emit a uc_request (useful compute request) ONLY when the dossier verdict is accept and the evidence gap can be reduced by spectral / DEM / geophysics fusion
hard_rules: NEVER assert a confirmed mineral deposit, mineral reserve, or drilling evidence
NEVER omit the seven mandatory disclaimers required by the v0.1 geo dossier
NEVER use paid data providers or live satellite APIs in dry-run mode
ALWAYS treat AOIs near known SOST demo sites (Kalgoorlie, Pilbara, Zambia) as duplicates
ALWAYS require geological review before any public claim
required_disclaimers: requires geological review before any public claim
